evals.prompt: Write a userscript that adds buttons to a dynamic page and avoids duplicate UI when the site rerenders.
evals.expected_output: Guidance that narrows the metadata scope, keeps injection idempotent, and uses resilient page-state handling.
assertions: The response mentions narrow match or grant choices
The response mentions idempotent injection or duplicate-listener avoidance
The response prefers observers or targeted state checks over blind polling

evals.prompt: Review this userscript plan that stores page-specific settings and mutates the DOM in several places.
evals.expected_output: A review that centralizes selectors and storage keys, calls out namespacing, and explains how to fail softly when the host page changes.
assertions: The response recommends centralizing selectors or storage keys
The response mentions namespacing injected identifiers or styles
The response addresses graceful degradation when the host page changes
